preamble: The diphthongization of a nasalized back vowel [õ] to [ou] (or [õũ]) represents a historical stage in the development of nasal diphthongs in Western Romance.

examples.note: Portuguese historical stages where simple nasal vowels developed into nasal diphthongs.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
